description: Cross-language conformance for the AUDIO ranking profile (rank_for(audio kind) = the frozen base rank() + an integer lossless-codec bonus of LOSSLESS_BONUS=100 human-points = 100000 milli-points). A lossless codec (FLAC/ALAC/WAV/AIFF/DSD) outranks any lossy one regardless of bitrate/size; an unknown/absent codec is neutral (fail-open). Codec is resolved typed-first (vortx.tags via AudioCodec::from_wire) then from the label. The VIDEO profile is unaffected (the existing rank_vectors.json still holds). Scores are integer milli-points; a port must reproduce them byte-for-byte.
